mapper.select:
SELECT sl.situation_id, DATE_FORMAT(sl.log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS log_date, sl.shift_cd, cc.cd_code_nm AS shift_nm, DATE_FORMAT(sl.event_time, '%H:%i') AS event_time, sl.title, sl.content, sl.site_cd, si.site_name, sl.use_yn, sl.reg_id, au.user_nm AS reg_nm, DATE_FORMAT(sl.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, sl.upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(sl.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM situation_log sl LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div = 'SITUATION_SHIFT' AND cc.cd_code = sl.shift_cd AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = sl.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = sl.reg_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY sl.log_date DESC, sl.shift_cd ASC, sl.event_time ASC, sl.situation_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM situation_log sl LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div = 'SITUATION_SHIFT' AND cc.cd_code = sl.shift_cd AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = sl.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = sl.reg_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE 1 = 1

sql.if: AND ( sl.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sl.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR au.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sl.reg_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT sl.situation_id, DATE_FORMAT(sl.log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS log_date, sl.shift_cd, cc.cd_code_nm AS shift_nm, DATE_FORMAT(sl.event_time, '%H:%i') AS event_time, sl.title, sl.content, sl.site_cd, si.site_name, sl.use_yn, sl.reg_id, au.user_nm AS reg_nm, DATE_FORMAT(sl.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, sl.upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(sl.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM situation_log sl LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div = 'SITUATION_SHIFT' AND cc.cd_code = sl.shift_cd AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = sl.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.user_id = sl.reg_id AND au.use_yn = 1 WHERE sl.situation_id = #{situationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE situation_log SET log_date = #{logDate}, shift_cd = #{shiftCd}, event_time = #{eventTime}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, site_cd = #{siteCd}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE situation_id = #{situationId}
